## Goal
Build a production-grade storage engine (`rtparityd`) that:
- Survives power loss at ANY point with no silent corruption
- Rebuilds correctly after disk failure
- Detects and repairs corruption
- Maintains strict invariants at all times

Achieve this through continuous iteration: audit → imp
task:
